title: 【向IT狗嘅上司賜教】我有 set 屄數，點可以 chok 返個 Enterprise Value 出嚟？

replies.msg:
各位金融佬、會計佬、二世祖，平時外行人管內行人，撚鳩我哋 IT 狗，今次到我撚返你

此乃 2018 年 27.HK 嘅 Balance Sheet data，假設我有市值 (Marketcap)，有冇可能 chok 得返個 Enterprise Value？

條公式唔係咁咩
Enterprise Value = Marketcap + debt - (cash & cash equivalent)


睇返報表撮要
負債 = 88 億
流動現金同投資 = 458 億

就係 chok 唔到以上兩個數出嚟

負債 88 億係咪即係 shortterm_debt？

現金嗰 part 試過 cash_near_cash + invest，但好似都差少少

{
        "total_non_curr_asset": 69070795000.0,
        "liab_other": null,
        "placing_with_bank": null,
        "currency": "HKD",
        "exchange_rate": 1.0,
        "loan_to_bank": null,
        "insurance_fund": null,
        "loan_to_customer": null,
        "shortterm_debt": 8803558000.0,
        "loan_to_bank_customer": null,
        "investment_total": null,
        "deposits_from_bank": null,
        "minorities_bs": 550941000.0,
        "cover_period": 12.0,
        "interest_associate": null,
        "placement_from_bank": null,
        "total_equity": 62831200000.0,
        "other_liab_nomi": 562708000.0,
        "inventory": 189799000.0,
        "equity": 62280259000.0,
        "liab_trading": null,
        "curr_asset": 18313036000.0,
        "statement_type": "F",
        "share_cap": 22016854000.0,
        "auditors_opinion": "1",
        "loans_growth": null,
        "collection_from_bank": null,
        "other_curr_liab": 14934973000.0,
        "total_reserves": 40263405000.0,
        "longterm_debt": 251392000.0,
        "curr_liab": 23738531000.0,
        "insurance_receivable": null,
        "symbol": "00027:HK",
        "total_cap_resources": null,
        "quick_asset": 18123237000.0,
        "cash_near_cash": 14504823000.0,
        "total_debt_instruments": null,
        "deposits_statutory": null,
        "debt_securities": null,
        "other_curr_asset": 3618414000.0,
        "deposits_from_customer": null,
        "debt_issue": null,
        "total_non_curr_liab": 814100000.0,
        "asset_other": null,
        "fix_asset": 36280381000.0,
        "as_of_date": "2018-12-31T00:00:00",
        "invest": 31942234000.0,
        "deposits_growth": null,
        "goodwill": null,
        "equity_securities": null,
        "cash_shortterm_fund": null,
        "other_asset": 848180000.0,
        "stock_type": "O",
        "insurance_payable": null,
        "total_asset": 87383831000.0,
        "ipo_status": "N",
        "financial_investment": null,
        "liab_total": 24552631000.0,
        "trading_asset": null
    }
屌，俾人移咗去學術台
唔知up乜 但幫你推

quote.msg: 唔知up乜 但幫你推

replies.msg: 所以要搵金融佬、會計佬、投行佬、二世祖，佢哋先識

replies.msg:
先轉assessed value
無理由nil左佢
Apply番hoquiam formula
Enterprise value就唔洗減
2*2咁上自然會flat
當負債係88
Chok番個invest
0-1去計
條數就會無問題
知你講乜，但唔識答

replies.msg: 因為想整自動計數

未必有得就咁將BS既數 直接咁對落 摘要
因為好多時要真係有盤數拆breakdown先知果D數 包唔包或者包其中幾多
其實你用本身既方法其實都已經可以接受
